summary: Phase badges feature VERIFIED. All 3 badge types (planning, testing, revision) correctly implemented with proper data-testid attributes, gradient styling, icons, and animations. Backend API confirmed returning 'phase' field for all conversations.

tests: No pulse animation (correct for planning): PASSED

revision_badge.notes: No conversation with revision phase available for live testing, but code structure identical to tested badges. Code review confirms: data-testid='phase-revision-badge', teal-500 to emerald-500 gradient, RefreshCw icon, animate-pulse, AnimatePresence wrapper.

tests: No phase badge displayed when phase='learning': PASSED
Phase values correctly reflect conversation state: PASSED

CORRECT: Testing badge - amber/orange gradient with FlaskConical icon and pulse
CORRECT: Revision badge - teal/emerald gradient with RefreshCw icon and pulse
CORRECT: AnimatePresence wraps PhaseBadge for smooth transitions
CORRECT: All badges have proper data-testid attributes
CORRECT: No badge shows when phase is 'learning'
